final:
module top_module(

input wire iRead,
input wire iWrite,
input wire[7:0]iDataRAM,

input wire[7:0]iDataALU,
input wire [7:0]iRegister,
output wire [7:0]oRegister

wire neg_select_data = (iRead||iWrite);
assign oRegister = neg_select_data ? ( iRead ? iDataRAM:iDataALU) : iRegister;






endmodule
